campaigns.tplReengagementBody:
It's been a while since we last saw you at {{restaurant}}.

You still have {{points}} points waiting! Come and use them — we can't wait to see you again.
campaigns.tplBirthdayBody:
The whole team at {{restaurant}} wishes you a very happy birthday!

Come visit us to celebrate — we have a surprise for you 🎁
campaigns.tplNearRewardBody:
Great news! With your {{points}} points, you're not far from your reward at {{restaurant}}.

Just a few more visits and it's yours!
campaigns.tplDoublePointsBody:
This week only, earn double points on every visit to {{restaurant}}!

Hurry, this offer is limited 🚀
campaigns.tplPromoBody:
Dear {{prenom}},

We have an exclusive offer for you at {{restaurant}}.

Come visit us to take advantage of it!

support.title: Help Center
support.subtitle: Find answers to frequently asked questions or contact our team.
support.contactDesc: Our team typically responds within 24 business hours.
support.faq1q: How do I create my first loyalty card?
support.faq1a: Go to Wallet Studio from the dashboard sidebar. Create a card template, customize it with your colors and logo, then set it as the default template.
support.faq2q: How do I scan a customer QR code?
support.faq2a: Open /dashboard/scanner from your mobile phone. You can also add a shortcut to your home screen for quick access.
support.faq3q: How do I send an email campaign?
support.faq3a: In the dashboard, go to the Campaigns tab. Choose the campaign type, write your message and select your recipients. Click Send to launch the campaign.
support.faq4q: How do I set up Apple Wallet?
support.faq4a: You need an Apple Developer account. Create a Pass Type ID in the developer portal, generate a .p12 certificate, then configure the environment variables APPLE_PASS_TYPE_IDENTIFIER, APPLE_TEAM_IDENTIFIER, APPLE_PASS_CERT_P12_BASE64, APPLE_PASS_CERT_PASSPHRASE and APPLE_WWDR_PEM.
support.faq5a: Check that all APPLE_PASS_* environment variables are correctly configured in your Vercel project. Make sure the .p12 certificate is valid and the password matches. Check Vercel logs for more details.
support.faq6q: How do I add the scanner to my home screen?
support.faq6a: Open /dashboard/scanner in Safari on your iPhone or iPad. Tap the Share button (square icon with an arrow), then select "Add to Home Screen". On Android, open the browser menu and select "Add to Home Screen".

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: ReBites SRL, hereinafter "ReBites", "we", is responsible for processing personal data collected through the ReBites platform (rebites.be).
privacy.section3Item1: Management of the loyalty program (points, stamps, rewards).
privacy.section3Item3: Generation of digital cards (Apple Wallet, Google Wallet).
privacy.section5Text: End customer data is retained as long as the merchant's loyalty program is active. Data is deleted within 30 days after account closure or upon deletion request.
privacy.section6Intro: We never sell your data. It may be shared with:
privacy.section7Intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation, you have the following rights:
privacy.section7Contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at privacy@rebites.be. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.section8Text: ReBites only uses essential cookies for platform operation (Supabase authentication session). No advertising tracking cookies are used.
privacy.section9Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data: encryption in transit (TLS), data isolation per merchant, strong authentication, and restricted access to sensitive data.
privacy.section10Text: If you believe your data processing does not comply with GDPR, you may file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority (DPA): www.autoriteprotectiondonnees.be.

billing.title: Billing
billing.pastDueWarning: Your payment failed. Update your payment method to avoid service interruption.
billing.canceledWarning: Your subscription is canceled. Reactivate your plan to continue using all features.
billing.comparePlans: Compare features and choose the right plan
billing.viewInvoices: View invoices and payment methods on Stripe
billing.faq1q: How do I change my plan?
billing.faq1a: Click "Upgrade" above to move to a higher plan. Use "Manage subscription" to access the Stripe portal and modify your plan.
billing.faq2q: How do I cancel my subscription?
billing.faq2a: Access the Stripe portal via "Manage subscription". You can cancel anytime. Access remains active until the end of the current period.
billing.faq3q: Where can I find my invoices?
billing.faq3a: All your invoices are available in the Stripe portal. Click "View invoices" in the Billing information section.

wallet.templatesDesc: A template is the model for your digital loyalty card: it defines the design, points or stamps rules, and the reward.
wallet.firstTemplateHint: Create your first template to start issuing passes.
wallet.applePassesDesc: Passes are generated and signed automatically. Use the test button to install a pass on your iPhone and validate the configuration.

walletPreview.loginRequiredDesc: Sign in to access the Wallet preview.
walletPreview.infoBanner: This preview shows the structure of an Apple Wallet card for {name}. No actual .pkpass file is generated here — complete the signing steps below to distribute real cards to customers.
walletPreview.infoBannerConfigurator: Customize the Wallet card for {name}. Changes are reflected in the preview in real time. Save to a template to apply to your customers' cards.
walletPreview.stripImageHint: Image displayed behind the primary fields (375×123 px recommended)
walletPreview.logoImageHint: Square logo displayed at the top left of the card (200×200 px recommended).
walletPreview.logoSizeNote: Apple Wallet controls logo size automatically (max 50×50pt). The slider has been removed as it has no effect on the real pass.
walletPreview.showLogoTextDesc: Text displayed next to the logo in the header.
walletPreview.qrPlacementNote: Apple Wallet fixes the QR code at the bottom of the card. You can customize the format and content, but not the position.
walletPreview.previewDisclaimer: Preview based on Apple Wallet rendering. Final result may vary slightly depending on device.
walletPreview.barcodeAltTextPlaceholder: Scan this code at the counter
walletPreview.headerFieldsHint: Displayed top-right (max 3). Default: VISITS (auto). Add fields to override the automatic counter.
walletPreview.secondaryFieldsHint: CLIENT and REWARD are added automatically. You can add up to 2 custom fields (max 4 total).
walletPreview.backFieldsHint: Program and Terms are added automatically. Add your own fields (contact, GDPR, etc.).
walletPreview.auxiliaryFieldsHint: REMAINING is added automatically. You can add up to 3 custom fields (max 4 total).
walletPreview.stampModeDefaultDesc: Standard circles — works everywhere, no images required
walletPreview.stampModeCustomDesc: Your own images for empty and filled stamps
walletPreview.stampLoginRequired: Log in to upload custom images.
walletPreview.signingSubtitle: Complete these steps to distribute real .pkpass files
walletPreview.signingStep1Desc: Sign up at developer.apple.com ($99/year). Required to create Pass Type Identifiers and sign.
walletPreview.signingStep2Desc: Developer portal → Certificates, Identifiers & Profiles → Identifiers → Pass Type IDs. Replace "pass.YOUR_BUNDLE_ID" in the pass.json.
walletPreview.signingStep3Desc: Create a Pass Type ID certificate from the portal. Download Apple's WWDR intermediate certificate (G4). Export your private key as .pem.
walletPreview.signingStep4Desc: Node.js library that builds and signs the .pkpass bundle.
walletPreview.signingStep5Desc: Import PKPass, load your certificates from environment variables, sign the pass.json, and return the .pkpass file.
walletPreview.signingStep6Desc: The /public/wallet/icon.svg and logo.svg files must be exported to PNG at the exact dimensions listed below and included in the bundle.
walletPreview.imagesHint: SVG placeholders available in /public/wallet/ — convert them to PNG before signing.
walletPreview.scanQrInstructions: Show this QR code at checkout
